evals.name: Basic Repository Analysis
evals.description: Test basic repository analysis with a simple project
evals.expected_output: Should extract repository metadata, identify the tech stack, and generate a structured analysis report
assertions: Report includes repository name and owner
Report includes star and fork counts

evals.name: Tech Stack Identification
evals.description: Test technical stack identification from package files
evals.input: Analyze the tech stack of this repository: https://github.com/vercel/next.js
evals.expected_output: Should identify JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Node.js, and related dependencies

evals.name: Best Practices Extraction
evals.description: Test extraction of best practices from well-maintained projects
evals.expected_output: Should identify code organization, testing strategies, documentation practices

evals.name: Knowledge Graph Integration
evals.description: Test that analysis updates the knowledge graph
evals.input: Analyze https://github.com/microsoft/vscode and update the knowledge graph
evals.expected_output: Should create entities for the repository, technologies, and create relationships

evals.name: memU Integration Analysis
evals.description: Test identification of memU integration opportunities
evals.input: Analyze https://github.com/microsoft/typescript and identify how memU could learn from it
evals.expected_output: Should identify architectural patterns, best practices, and integration opportunities
